name: tooltip
description: A floating contextual label, CSS-only; WAI-ARIA tooltip pattern (panel role=tooltip + the trigger's aria-describedby). Positionable via side (top/right/bottom/left), align (start/center/end) and sideOffset, with a data-slot=tooltip-arrow square pointing back at the trigger. Revealed by group-hover/group-focus-within. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the tooltip partial to your JTE root at lievit/tooltip.jte, reached as @template.lievit.tooltip(content="...", tipId="...", trigger=@`...`). Put aria-describedby=tipId on the interactive trigger so the label is announced on focus. Pass side/align/sideOffset to position the panel; the tooltip-arrow follows the chosen side. The source is yours: edit freely.
